hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) python3 scripts/build-recent-additions.py >/dev/null 2>&1; if ! git diff --quiet -- README.md 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"scripts/build-recent-additions.py refreshed the README Recently added list; README.md now has uncommitted changes. Stage and commit README.md so the refresh is included in this change."}}'; fi ;; esac
